'''"Black-Eye" Cahoon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clantaani]] criminal who was an associate of the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] gang leader [[Longo Two-Guns]]. During his [[Time/Legends|time]] on Tatooine, he was believed to have played a role in the kidnapping of some of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing girls. As a result, he was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] from Jabba.

==Behind the scenes==
The bounty is 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,500 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]]. It is up to the players decision on which way.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
